title: aronia × floribunda var. glabrescens
intro: Aronia × floribunda var. glabrescens, also known as Chokeberry, is a deciduous shrub that is native to North America. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include high levels of anthocyanins, powerful antioxidants that have been shown to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Aronia × floribunda var. glabrescens include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cognitive function, and boost the immune system. Aronia × floribunda var. glabrescens can be consumed as a supplement, or used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
